event_notes: Source venue label: I-5 North to Bellingham, take Bellis Fair/Meridian Exit going west, drive down Meridian for a mile or two and the park is on the left.
event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (1993-1997) updated canonical event metadata. Reason: Replace the long Bellingham driving directions row with the actual park name.
